  · have : IsOpen {y | (y : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by
      induction τ n ω using WithTop.recTopCoe
      · simp only [isOpen_univ, Set.setOf_true]
      · simp only [WithTop.coe_lt_coe, isOpen_Iio]
    filter_upwards [this.mem_nhds hn] with y hy
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le, Set.indicator_of_mem]
    · exact lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn
    · exact hy.le
  · rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le, Set.indicator_of_mem]
    · exact lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn
    · exact hn.le

end NormedSpace

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω x le_rfl
  refine (hX.stoppedProcess n ω x).congr_of_eventuallyEq ?_ ?_
  · filter_upwards [mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds (isOpen_Iio.mem_nhds hn)] with y hy
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hy.le, Set.indicator_of_mem (lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hy)]
  · rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hn.le, Set.indicator_of_mem (lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn)]

rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hX⟩
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω t
  specialize hω (Set.Ioi t) (isOpen_Ioi.mem_nhds (WithTop.coe_lt_top t))
  rcases hω.exists with ⟨n, hn⟩
  apply Function.RightContinuousAt.congr (hX n ω t)
  have : ∀ᶠ i in 𝓝[≥] t, i < τ n ω := by
    apply Filter.eventually_nhdsWithin_of_eventually_nhds
    cases h : τ n ω with
    | none =>
      rw [h]
      exact Filter.eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ WithTop.coe_lt_top _
    | some u =>
      rw [h] at hn ⊢
      exact Iio_mem_nhds hn
  filter_upwards [this] with i hi
  unfold stoppedProcess
  rw [Set.indicator_of_mem]
  · congr
    symm
    apply min_eq_left
    exact le_of_lt hi
  · exact lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn

obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hXτ⟩ := hX
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  specialize hω (Set.Ioi x) (isOpen_Ioi.mem_nhds (WithTop.coe_lt_top x))
  rw [Filter.eventually_atTop] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω
  specialize hn n le_rfl
  have h_eq : (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n)) · ω =ᶠ[𝓝[≥] x] X · ω := by
    filter_upwards [Ico_mem_nhdsWithin_Ici ⟨le_rfl, hn⟩] with y ⟨hxy, hyτ⟩
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hyτ.le, Set.indicator_of_mem]
    exact (bot_le.trans hxy).trans_lt hyτ
  rw [Function.RightContinuous]
  exact Tendsto.congr' h_eq (hXτ n ω x)

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω x
  specialize hn n le_rfl
  refine ContinuousWithinAt.congr_of_eventuallyEq (hX.stoppedProcess n ω x) ?_ ?_
  · have : IsOpen {y | (y : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω} := by
      cases hX.localSeq n ω <;> simp [isOpen_univ, isOpen_Iio]
    filter_upwards [mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds (this.mem_nhds hn)] with y hy
    unfold stoppedProcess
    dsimp
    rw [Set.indicator_of_mem (lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn)]
    congr
    symm
    exact min_eq_left (le_of_lt hy)
  · unfold stoppedProcess
    dsimp
    rw [Set.indicator_of_mem (lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn)]
    congr
    symm
    exact min_eq_left (le_of_lt hn)

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (hω x).exists
  have h_cont := hX.stoppedProcess n ω x
  refine h_cont.congr_of_eventuallyEq ?_ (by
    rw [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator_of_mem, min_eq_left hn.le]
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn)
  have : {i | (i : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    cases h : hX.localSeq n ω with
    | none =>
      simp only [h, WithTop.coe_lt_top, Set.setOf_true, Filter.univ_mem]
    | some z =>
      simp only [h, WithTop.coe_lt_coe, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hn ⊢
      exact isOpen_Iio.mem_nhds hn
  filter_upwards [mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds this] with y hy
  rw [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator_of_mem]
  · simp only [min_eq_left hy.le]
  · exact lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le (lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hy)

obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hXτ⟩ := hX
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω x le_rfl
  specialize hXτ n ω x
  rw [Function.RightContinuousAt] at hXτ ⊢
  refine tendsto_nhdsWithin_congr (fun y hy ↦ ?_) ?_ hXτ
  · have : {z | ↑z < τ n ω} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
      match h : τ n ω with
      | ⊤ => simp only [h, WithTop.coe_lt_top, Set.setOf_true, univ_mem]
      | (b : ι) =>
        rw [h] at hn ⊢
        simp only [WithTop.coe_lt_coe] at hn ⊢
        exact isOpen_Iio.mem_nhds hn
    filter_upwards [mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds this] with y hy
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hy.le, Set.indicator_of_mem]
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn
  · rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hn.le, Set.indicator_of_mem]
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω x
  have h_ind : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω := bot_le.trans_lt hn
  have h_eq : ∀ y < hX.localSeq n ω,
      stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n) y ω = X y ω := by
    intro y hy
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le _ hy.le, Set.indicator_of_mem h_ind]
  refine (hX.stoppedProcess n ω x).congr_of_eventuallyEq ?_ (h_eq x hn).symm
  rw [eventually_nhdsWithin_iff]
  filter_upwards [isOpen_Iio.mem_nhds hn] with y hy _
  exact (h_eq y hy).symm
